description: Record teleoperation episodes as a training dataset

parameters.--repo-id: local/<name> or HuggingFace repo ID (e.g. local/my_task or username/my_dataset)
parameters.--single-task: Human-readable description of the task (e.g. 'pick up the red block')
parameters.--leader-arms: Leader arm ID from calibration config (e.g. leader_arm_1 or main_leader)
parameters.--follower-arms: Follower arm ID from calibration config (e.g. follower_arm_1 or main_follower)
parameters.--cameras: Optional: camera IDs and angles (omit flag entirely if no cameras)
parameters.--push-to-hub: 0 (local only) or 1 (push to HuggingFace Hub after recording)

explanation: Records leader→follower teleoperation as structured dataset episodes (images, joint states, actions). Dataset format: LeRobot-compatible. ALL parameters should be passed as flags so the terminal does not re-prompt for them.
expected_output: Episodes recorded, videos encoded, dataset saved

validation.rule: Dataset directory must exist locally OR repo visible on HuggingFace Hub

keyboard_controls.Right Arrow: Early stop current episode, advance to next
keyboard_controls.ESC: Stop session, encode videos, upload if enabled

common_errors: Dataset already exists — choose resume (adds episodes) or rename
Incomplete dataset directory from failed recording — prompted to delete or rename
Ports changed mid-session — auto-detected and retried once
HuggingFace auth required only if pushing to Hub
Wrong leader/follower arm ID — check available IDs in ~/.solo/ config files

description: Replay a recorded dataset episode on the follower arm

parameters.--dataset: Dataset repo ID (e.g. organize_fennel_seed or local/my_dataset)

explanation: Plays back stored action trajectories from a dataset on the follower (open-loop). Leader not required — only follower needs calibration. Use to verify recordings without holding the leader arm.

validation.rule: Follower arm physically replicates the recorded movement sequence

common_errors: Episode index out of range — check total episode count in dataset
Wrong follower-id — use --follower-id to specify correct arm ID
